title: Register a new owner account successfully and see email confirmation prompt
description: Verifies a new owner can complete registration and is prompted to confirm email.

steps.description: Type "AgenX Test Salon" into the business name input
Type "ValidPass!234" into the confirm password input

title: Registration fails when confirm password does not match
description: Verifies mismatched passwords are blocked with a visible validation error.

steps.description: Type "AgenX Mismatch Salon" into the business name input
Type "DifferentPass!234" into the confirm password input

title: Registration is blocked when required fields are left blank
description: Verifies the form prevents submission and shows validation when mandatory fields are empty.

title: Registration rejects an invalid email format
description: Verifies an invalid email address is rejected with a visible validation message.

steps.description: Type "AgenX Invalid Email Salon" into the business name input
Type "ValidPass!234" into the confirm password input

title: Registration rejects a weak password (minimum strength/length)
description: Verifies a weak password is blocked with a visible validation error.

steps.description: Type "AgenX Weak Password Salon" into the business name input
Type "123" into the confirm password input

title: User can navigate from Register to Login page
description: Verifies the registration page provides a path to the login page.

title: User can navigate from Register to Forgot Password page
description: Verifies the registration page provides a path to password recovery.

title: Request password reset shows generic confirmation message
description: Verifies the forgot-password flow accepts an email and shows a non-specific confirmation message.

steps.description: Verify text "Check your email" is visible
Verify text "If an account exists" is visible

title: Forgot-password with unregistered email still shows generic confirmation
description: Verifies the UI does not reveal whether an email exists by showing the same generic confirmation.

steps.description: Verify text "Check your email" is visible
Verify text "If an account exists" is visible

title: Forgot-password requires email validation before sending
description: Verifies the send action is blocked or an error is shown when the email field is empty.

title: Forgot-password rejects invalid email format
description: Verifies an invalid email format shows a visible validation error.

title: Update password page loads and enforces required fields
description: Verifies the update-password form is present and shows errors when submitted with empty fields.

steps.description: Verify text "Confirm new password" is visible

title: Update password shows error when passwords do not match
description: Verifies the UI blocks submission and displays a mismatch error when confirmation differs.

steps.description: Type "DifferentPassword123!" into the "Confirm new password" field
Verify text "do not match" is visible

title: Update password rejects too-short/weak password
description: Verifies the UI displays an error when the new password does not meet minimum requirements.

steps.description: Type "123" into the "Confirm new password" field

title: Forgot-password page allows returning to login
description: Verifies there is a visible way to navigate back to the login page from the forgot-password screen.

title: Dashboard shows core KPI cards (revenue, average ticket, occupancy)
description: Verifies the dashboard loads after login and all three KPI cards are visible.

title: Open detailed insights from the Revenue KPI card
description: Verifies a user can click the Revenue KPI card and see a detailed insights view.

title: Open detailed insights from the Average ticket KPI card
description: Verifies a user can click the Average ticket KPI card and see a detailed insights view.

title: Open detailed insights from the Occupancy KPI card
description: Verifies a user can click the Occupancy KPI card and see a detailed insights view.

title: Refresh metrics updates the dashboard KPI display
description: Verifies clicking refresh triggers a visible change indicating metrics were updated.

title: Dashboard KPI cards remain visible after refresh
description: Verifies refresh does not remove KPI cards and the dashboard remains usable.

title: Create a new appointment from a calendar time slot (happy path)
description: Verifies a user can create an appointment by selecting service, professional, date/time, and saving, then seeing it on the week calendar.

steps.description: Click a visible time slot in the calendar grid to create a new appointment
Select a service from the service dropdown
Select a professional from the professional dropdown
Select a date and time in the date/time picker
Verify the newly created appointment is visible on the calendar

title: Edit an existing appointment and verify updates appear on the calendar
description: Verifies a user can open an existing appointment, change fields, save, and see the updated appointment on the calendar.

steps.description: Verify at least one appointment block is visible on the calendar
Click an existing appointment block on the calendar
Select a different service from the service dropdown
Verify the appointment on the calendar reflects the updated service

title: Prevent creating an overlapping appointment (conflict error)
description: Verifies the calendar detects a scheduling conflict and shows a visible error when attempting to save an overlapping appointment.

steps.description: Verify at least one appointment block is visible on the calendar
Click an existing appointment block on the calendar
Note the appointment's displayed start time and professional shown in the modal
Click the "Cancel" or "Close" button to return to the calendar
Click a time slot that matches the noted start time for the same professional
Select a service from the service dropdown
Select the same professional from the professional dropdown
Select the same date and start time as the noted appointment

title: Mark an appointment as completed
description: Verifies a user can mark an appointment completed and sees a visible completed status indicator.

steps.description: Verify at least one appointment block is visible on the calendar
Click an existing appointment block on the calendar
Verify the appointment shows a visible completed indicator on the calendar

title: Validate required fields when creating an appointment
description: Verifies the appointment form blocks saving and shows validation messaging when required fields are missing.

steps.description: Click a visible time slot in the calendar grid to create a new appointment

title: Close the new appointment modal without saving
description: Verifies a user can cancel out of appointment creation and no new appointment appears on the calendar.

steps.description: Click a visible time slot in the calendar grid to create a new appointment
Select a service from the service dropdown
Select a professional from the professional dropdown
Verify the appointment modal is not visible

title: Delete an existing appointment from the edit modal
description: Verifies a user can delete an appointment and the appointment is no longer visible on the calendar.

steps.description: Verify at least one appointment block is visible on the calendar
Click an existing appointment block on the calendar
Verify the deleted appointment is not visible on the calendar

title: Add a new walk-in client to the waiting queue
description: Verifies an owner can add a client with a name and service and see the client appear in the waiting (Aguardando) list.

title: Call next client and complete the service
description: Verifies an owner can call the next client from the waiting list, see them move to in-service, then mark them completed.

title: Validation: Attempt to add client without required name
description: Verifies the add-client form blocks submission and shows a validation message when the required name field is missing.

title: Login and view Clients list page
description: Verifies an authenticated user can access the Clients page and see the client list UI.

steps.description: Verify URL contains "/#/clientes" after clicking on the "Clients" navigation item

title: Search clients by name filters the list
description: Verifies searching by client name filters results on the Clients list.

steps.description: Type "Ana" into the client search field
Verify text "Ana" is visible in the clients list

title: Open a client profile from the list
description: Verifies selecting a client from the list opens the client profile page.

steps.description: Click on the first client in the clients list

title: Client profile shows appointment/visit history section
description: Verifies the client profile renders and includes a visible visit/appointment history area.

steps.description: Click on the first client in the clients list

title: Add a new client with name and contact appears in list
description: Verifies a user can add a new client and see it appear in the client list.

steps.description: Type "Teste Cliente CRM" into the name field
Verify text "Teste Cliente CRM" is visible in the clients list

title: Add new client validation error when contact is missing
description: Verifies the UI blocks saving a client when contact is missing and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Type "Cliente Sem Contato" into the name field
Verify text "contact is required" is visible

title: Search with no matches shows empty state
description: Verifies searching for a non-existent name shows an appropriate empty state and does not crash.

steps.description: Type "ZZZ_NAO_EXISTE_123" into the client search field
Verify text "No clients found" is visible

title: Finance page loads and daily cashflow chart is visible
description: Verifies an authenticated user can reach Financial Management and see the daily cashflow chart UI.

steps.description: Click on "Financeiro" in the main navigation

title: Switch between daily and monthly cashflow chart views
description: Verifies the user can view both daily and monthly cashflow chart views on the Finance page.

steps.description: Click on "Financeiro" in the main navigation

title: Select a specific date to view that day’s transactions
description: Verifies selecting a date updates the visible transactions list/ledger for that day.

steps.description: Click on "Financeiro" in the main navigation
Click on a visible date in the cashflow/date selector

title: Add an income transaction and see it appear in the ledger
description: Verifies an income transaction can be created and becomes visible in the transaction ledger.

steps.description: Click on "Financeiro" in the main navigation

title: Add an income transaction with details and confirm it is visible
description: Verifies an income transaction with description/details can be saved and found in the ledger by its visible text.

steps.description: Click on "Financeiro" in the main navigation
Type "Haircut upsell test" into the details field
Verify text "Haircut upsell test" is visible

title: Validation error when saving income transaction with empty amount
description: Verifies the amount field is required and shows a visible validation message when empty.

steps.description: Click on "Financeiro" in the main navigation
Verify text "Amount is required" is visible

title: Cancel out of Add income transaction without creating a ledger entry
description: Verifies the user can exit the add-transaction flow without saving and returns to the Finance ledger view.

steps.description: Click on "Financeiro" in the main navigation

title: Finance page shows ledger section and cashflow section together
description: Verifies the core Finance UI includes both cashflow visualization and a transactions ledger area.

steps.description: Click on "Financeiro" in the main navigation

title: Access Reports and Insights and view revenue chart
description: Verifies an owner can navigate to Insights and the revenue chart is visible.

title: View occupancy chart on Reports and Insights
description: Verifies the occupancy chart is visible on the Insights page.

title: Change timeframe filter and see charts update
description: Verifies changing the timeframe filter updates the visible chart period in Insights.

steps.description: Select "Last 30 days" from the timeframe dropdown

title: Switch timeframe from Last 30 days to Last 7 days
description: Verifies timeframe can be changed again and the selected period is reflected on the page.

steps.description: Select "Last 7 days" from the timeframe dropdown

title: Open Export report options from Insights
description: Verifies the export action shows available export format options.

steps.description: Verify element "Export format options" is visible

title: Select a timeframe with no data and see empty state
description: Verifies Insights shows an empty state message when the selected timeframe contains no data.

steps.description: Verify element "No data" empty state is visible

title: Empty state still allows changing timeframe back to a period with data
description: Verifies the user can recover from an empty state by selecting another timeframe and seeing charts again.

steps.description: Verify element "No data" empty state is visible
Select "This month" from the timeframe dropdown

title: Add a new team member and confirm it appears in the team list
description: Verifies an authenticated owner can add a team member from Team Settings and see the new entry in the list.

steps.description: Click the "Add new team member" button
Verify text "New team member" is visible
Type "E2E Team Member" into the Name field
Verify text "E2E Team Member" is visible

title: Add a new service with name, price, and duration and confirm it appears in the services list
description: Verifies an authenticated owner can create a service and see it listed in Service Settings.

steps.description: Type "E2E Haircut" into the Service name field

title: Attempt to add a service with missing price and verify validation error
description: Verifies required-field validation prevents saving a service when price is missing.

steps.description: Type "E2E Service Missing Price" into the Service name field
Verify text "Price is required" is visible

title: Navigate from Team Settings to Service Settings using in-app navigation
description: Verifies the user can move between Team and Services settings pages without direct URL navigation.

title: Access Security Settings page and verify key security options are visible
description: Verifies an authenticated user can reach the Security Settings screen and see 2FA/security configuration sections.

title: Open Audit Logs page and verify audit entries table is visible
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open Audit Logs and view the log list with expected columns.

title: Navigate from General Settings to Audit Logs and verify URL change
description: Verifies navigation from General Settings to Audit Logs works using in-app controls and the Audit Logs page loads.

steps.description: Click on the "Audit Logs" navigation item

title: Filter Audit Logs by user and verify matching results are shown
description: Verifies filtering audit logs by a user identifier updates the visible results.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the user filter field

title: Filter Audit Logs by timeframe and verify results update
description: Verifies filtering audit logs by a date/time range updates the visible entries list.

steps.description: Select "Last 7 days" from the timeframe dropdown
Verify element "Audit log results list" is visible

title: Audit Logs filter yields no results and shows empty state message
description: Verifies the Audit Logs page shows an explicit empty state when filters return no entries.

steps.description: Type "user_that_should_not_exist_99999@example.com" into the user filter field
Verify text "No audit entries" is visible

title: Security Settings validation: attempt to save without required fields and verify visible error
description: Verifies the Security Settings form shows a visible validation message when saving invalid or incomplete security configuration.

steps.description: Click on a 2FA or security option to put the form into an incomplete/invalid state

title: View Marketing Opportunities list with AI-suggested contacts
description: Verifies an owner can access Marketing and see an opportunities list with suggested contacts and revenue potential.

steps.description: Click on "Marketing" in the main navigation

title: Open an opportunity and preview AI-generated WhatsApp message/link
description: Verifies opening an opportunity allows generating AI copy and previewing a WhatsApp deep link/message.

steps.description: Click on "Marketing" in the main navigation
Click on the first opportunity in the opportunities list

title: Verify opportunity detail shows revenue potential or value indicator
description: Verifies the opportunity detail view includes a visible indicator of potential value (e.g., revenue potential).

steps.description: Click on "Marketing" in the main navigation
Click on the first opportunity in the opportunities list

title: Generate WhatsApp deep link from an AI opportunity and see it in preview
description: Verifies generating from an opportunity produces a visible WhatsApp link in the UI preview.

steps.description: Click on "Marketing" in the main navigation
Click on the first opportunity in the opportunities list
Click on the "Generate WhatsApp link" button
Verify element "WhatsApp deep link" is visible

title: Execute send or export flow and confirm generation success message
description: Verifies using the send/export action results in a visible confirmation that the message or link was generated.

steps.description: Click on "Marketing" in the main navigation
Click on the first opportunity in the opportunities list

title: Cancel out of an opportunity detail without sending
description: Verifies a user can back out of an opportunity detail view and return to the opportunities list without executing send/export.

steps.description: Click on "Marketing" in the main navigation
Click on the first opportunity in the opportunities list

title: Empty state: no opportunities available shows recommendation message
description: Verifies Marketing shows an empty state message and recommendation when no opportunities are available.

steps.description: Click on "Marketing" in the main navigation
